content: make a report on rise of LLM

The rapid proliferation of Large Language Models (LLMs) has been fundamentally driven by breakthroughs in natural language processing, culminating in highly capable platforms such as OpenAI’s GPT series and Google’s Gemini [3250]. However, the strategic inflection point was not merely algorithmic; it was the democratization of these capabilities through accessible, natural language-based chatbot interfaces deployed at scale [3704].
